title: cyclamen mirabile f. niveum
intro: Cyclamen mirabile f. niveum, also known as the white cyclamen or white Persian violet, is a rare and unique species of plant belonging to the genus Cyclamen. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as relieving pain and reducing fever, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
